headline: Is Philip Morris International Inc. (PM) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is PM a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Philip Morris International Inc. on X.com by @MoneyShow. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on PM. Philip Morris International Inc.’s share was trading at $164.20 as of April 24th. PM’s trailing and forward P/E were 23.12 and 19.42 respectively according […]
